text: GST Collection: April 2024. ₹2,10,740 crore — highest ever monthly collection. YoY growth: 12.4%. CGST: ₹43,846 cr, SGST: ₹53,538 cr, IGST: ₹99,623 cr, Cess: ₹13,260 cr.
GST Collection: March 2024. ₹1,86,302 crore. YoY growth: 11.5%. Second highest monthly collection. End of FY24 compliance surge.
GST Collection: January 2025. ₹1,95,000 crore (approx). YoY growth: 10.8%. Strong start to Q4 FY25. Driven by festive season economic activity.
GST Collection: October 2024. ₹1,87,800 crore. YoY growth: 9.2%. Post-Diwali collection surge. E-invoicing compliance at 98%.
GST Collection: Full Year FY24. ₹20.18 lakh crore. YoY growth: 11.7%. Average monthly: ₹1.68 lakh crore. 1.44 crore registered taxpayers. Return filing compliance improved to 85%.
GST Collection: Full Year FY23. ₹18.06 lakh crore. YoY growth: 22%. Average monthly: ₹1.51 lakh crore. Highest growth year driven by post-COVID recovery and anti-evasion measures.
